name: Credit Capital
description_short: Credit Capital offers lines of credit and working capital loans to small and medium-sized businesses nationwide through a network of bank and non-bank lending partners.
description_long:
Credit Capital positions itself as a bridge between institutional lending and Main Street small businesses, leveraging what they describe as an "extensive network of bank and non-bank lending partners" to deliver financing options. The company operates with a focus on accessibility and speed for the SMB market.

The company offers two primary products: revolving lines of credit up to $250,000 and working capital loans up to $1 million. According to their website, lines of credit can be accessed "with the click of a button," suggesting an online application process, while working capital loans can be funded within 48 hours. These products are designed to address common small business needs for operational funding and cash flow management.

Credit Capital's stated differentiation is its network-based model—rather than being a direct lender, they aggregate options from multiple lending sources (both traditional banks and alternative lenders). This approach theoretically allows them to offer competitive rates and terms across different business profiles and credit situations. Their tagline "From Wall Street to Main Street" emphasizes democratizing access to capital.

Based on available information, Credit Capital appears to be a loan broker or aggregator rather than a direct lender. The website provides limited detail about specific terms, APR ranges, eligibility requirements, or transparency around fees. Prospective borrowers should verify actual rates, terms, and any associated costs before committing, as broker-model lenders often have variable pricing depending on which partner lender funds the loan.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers lines of credit up to $250,000 with online application ('click of a button' access)
Working capital loans available up to $1 million
Claims 48-hour funding timeline for working capital loans
Serves small and medium-sized businesses nationwide (not geographically limited)
Access to multiple lending partners (bank and non-bank sources)
Focuses specifically on business credit and working capital solutions
Revolving credit line option provides flexible access to capital
cons: Website lacks transparency on APR ranges, fees, or actual terms—critical details for borrowers
No information about minimum credit score, time-in-business, or eligibility requirements
As a broker/aggregator model, final rates and terms depend on which partner lender approves—not guaranteed
Limited details on application process, documentation requirements, or approval timeline for lines of credit
No customer testimonials, accreditation information, or regulatory details provided on website
best_for: Small to mid-sized businesses needing flexible revolving credit for operational expenses
Businesses seeking quick working capital infusions (under 48 hours)
Entrepreneurs who prefer online application processes over traditional bank meetings
diagnosis: Credit Capital is best suited for small-to-mid-sized business owners who need flexible working capital or revolving credit quickly and prefer online application processes. The main caveat is that the website provides virtually no transparency on actual rates, fees, terms, or eligibility—borrowers must contact them directly to understand true costs, and final terms will depend on which partner lender approves the application.
services: Working capital loans up to $1 million
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
